% check a.php
a.php:12:1: $a is of type: Warehouse\Box (DEBUG)
a.php:15:1: unknown var: $a (DEBUG)
a.php:16:1: $b is of type: Warehouse\Box (DEBUG)

% check b.php
b.php:9:1: unknown var: $x (DEBUG)
b.php:10:1: unknown var: $y (DEBUG)
b.php:11:1: $z is of type: Warehouse\Box (DEBUG)

% check c.php
c.php:9:1: $data is of type: Warehouse\Box (DEBUG)
c.php:12:1: $res is of type: Warehouse\Box (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

namespace Warehouse;

class Box
{
	function seal(): void;
}

$a = new Box;
$b = new Box;
#debugType $a

unset($a);
#debugType $a
#debugType $b

-- b.php --
<?php

use Warehouse\Box;

$x = new Box;
$y = new Box;
$z = new Box;
unset($x, $y);
#debugType $x
#debugType $y
#debugType $z

-- c.php --
<?php

use Warehouse\Box;

$data = new Box;
$res = new Box;
$k = 'foo';
unset($data->subjects);
#debugType $data

unset($res[$k]);
#debugType $res
